name: docx-redline-online
description: Compare DOCX versions online, accept or reject tracked changes, extract comments and convert Word to clean HTML or Markdown.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-ui build && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-worker-runtime build && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-types lint && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-ui lint && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-worker-runtime lint && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/web lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/shared-worker-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @docx-redline/web typecheck
